mapper.sql: gene_panel_cov AS ( SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id )

(SELECT md.gene_entrezGeneId AS entrez_gene_id, sd.internal_id AS sample_id, md.mutationStatus AS mutation_status, md.mutationType AS mutation_type, md.driverFilter AS driver_filter, md.driverTiersFilter AS driver_tiers_filter, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM mutation_derived md JOIN sd ON sd.sample_unique_id = CONCAT(md.studyId, '_', md.sampleId) JOIN genetic_profile gp ON md.molecularProfileId = gp.stable_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON sd.internal_id = sp.sample_id AND gp.genetic_profile_id = sp.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = md.gene_entrezGeneId WHERE md.mutationStatus != 'UNCALLED' AND sd.sample_unique_id IN (
) ) genomic_event_derived

(SELECT ce.entrez_gene_id AS entrez_gene_id, sce.sample_id AS sample_id, ce.alteration AS cna_alteration, rgg.cytoband AS cna_cytoband, ada.driver_filter AS driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter AS driver_tiers_filter, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM sample_cna_event sce JOIN cna_event ce ON sce.cna_event_id = ce.cna_event_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON sce.sample_id = sp.sample_id AND sce.genetic_profile_id = sp.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sce.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN reference_genome_gene rgg ON rgg.entrez_gene_id = ce.entrez_gene_id AND rgg.reference_genome_id = cs.reference_genome_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sce.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sce.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sce.cna_event_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = ce.entrez_gene_id WHERE sce.sample_id IN () ) genomic_event_derived

(SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol AS hugo_gene_symbol, g.entrez_gene_id AS entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, sv.sv_status AS mutation_status, ada.driver_filter AS driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter AS driver_tiers_filter, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM structural_variant sv JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sv.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN sample s ON sv.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN gene g ON sv.site1_entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON s.internal_id = sp.sample_id AND sp.genetic_profile_id = sv.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sv.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sv.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sv.internal_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = sv.site1_entrez_gene_id WHERE sv.sample_id IN () UNION ALL SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol AS hugo_gene_symbol, g.entrez_gene_id AS entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, sv.sv_status AS mutation_status, ada.driver_filter AS driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter AS driver_tiers_filter, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM structural_variant sv JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sv.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN sample s ON sv.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN gene g ON sv.site2_entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON s.internal_id = sp.sample_id AND sp.genetic_profile_id = sv.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sv.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sv.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sv.internal_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = sv.site2_entrez_gene_id WHERE (sv.site2_entrez_gene_id != sv.site1_entrez_gene_id OR sv.site1_entrez_gene_id IS NULL) AND sv.sample_id IN () ) genomic_event_derived

(SELECT concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, gp.genetic_alteration_type AS alteration_type, IFNULL(gene_panel.stable_id, 'WES') AS gene_panel_id, cs.cancer_study_identifier AS cancer_study_identifier, gp.stable_id AS genetic_profile_id FROM sample_profile sp INNER JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sp.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel ON sp.panel_id = gene_panel.internal_id INNER JOIN sample s ON sp.sample_id = s.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id)

(SELECT gp.stable_id AS gene_panel_id, g.hugo_gene_symbol AS gene FROM gene_panel gp INNER JOIN gene_panel_list gpl ON gp.internal_id = gpl.internal_id INNER JOIN gene g ON g.entrez_gene_id = gpl.gene_id UNION ALL SELECT 'WES' AS gene_panel_id, gene.hugo_gene_symbol AS gene FROM gene WHERE gene.entrez_gene_id > 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT hugo_gene_symbol as hugoGeneSymbol, entrez_gene_id as entrezGeneId, COUNT(DISTINCT sample_unique_id) as numberOfAlteredCases, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN off_panel = 0 THEN sample_unique_id END) as numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel, COUNT(*) as totalCount FROM genomic_event_derived
variant_type = 'mutation' AND mutation_status != 'UNCALLED' AND
GROUP BY entrez_gene_id, hugo_gene_symbol ORDER BY totalCount DESC, hugo_gene_symbol ASC

SELECT hugo_gene_symbol as hugoGeneSymbol, entrez_gene_id as entrezGeneId, cna_alteration as alteration, cna_cytoband as cytoband, COUNT(DISTINCT sample_unique_id) as numberOfAlteredCases, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN off_panel = 0 THEN sample_unique_id END) as numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel, COUNT(*) as totalCount FROM genomic_event_derived
variant_type = 'cna' AND
GROUP BY entrez_gene_id, hugo_gene_symbol, alteration, cytoband ORDER BY totalCount DESC, hugo_gene_symbol ASC

SELECT hugo_gene_symbol as hugoGeneSymbol, entrez_gene_id as entrezGeneId, COUNT(DISTINCT sample_unique_id) as numberOfAlteredCases, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN off_panel = 0 THEN sample_unique_id END) as numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel, COUNT(*) as totalCount FROM genomic_event_derived
variant_type = 'structural_variant' AND
GROUP BY entrez_gene_id, hugo_gene_symbol ORDER BY totalCount DESC, hugo_gene_symbol ASC

SELECT gptg.gene as hugoGeneSymbol, COUNT(*) as numberOfProfiledCases FROM stgp INNER JOIN gptg on stgp.gene_panel_id = gptg.gene_panel_id
stgp.alteration_type = #{alterationType} AND stgp.gene_panel_id != 'WES'
AND stgp.genetic_profile_id IN
#{molecularProfile.stableId}
AND
GROUP BY gptg.gene

SELECT gptg.gene as hugoGeneSymbol, gptg.gene_panel_id as genePanelId FROM gptg
gptg.gene_panel_id in ( select distinct stgp.gene_panel_id from stgp
stgp.alteration_type = #{alterationType} AND
)
GROUP BY gptg.gene, gptg.gene_panel_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stgp.sample_unique_id) FROM stgp
stgp.alteration_type = #{alterationType} AND stgp.gene_panel_id = 'WES' AND
SELECT gpgd.gene_panel_id as genePanelId, gpgd.gene as hugoGeneSymbol, g.entrez_gene_id as entrezGeneId FROM gpgd JOIN gene g ON g.hugo_gene_symbol=gpgd.gene
mapper.sql:
(SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol, m.entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, s.internal_id AS sample_internal_id, p.internal_id AS patient_internal_id, gp.stable_id AS genetic_profile_stable_id, 'mutation' AS variant_type, me.mutation_type, m.mutation_status, ada.driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter, CAST(NULL AS TINYINT) AS cna_alteration, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM mutation m JOIN mutation_event me ON m.mutation_event_id = me.mutation_event_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON m.sample_id = sp.sample_id AND m.genetic_profile_id = sp.genetic_profile_id JOIN genetic_profile gp ON m.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN sample s ON m.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN patient p ON s.patient_id = p.internal_id JOIN gene g ON m.entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON m.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND m.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND m.mutation_event_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = m.entrez_gene_id WHERE m.mutation_status != 'UNCALLED'
AND m.sample_id IN (SELECT sample_internal_id FROM sample_ids)
UNION ALL SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol, ce.entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, s.internal_id AS sample_internal_id, p.internal_id AS patient_internal_id, gp.stable_id AS genetic_profile_stable_id, 'cna' AS variant_type, 'NA' AS mutation_type, 'NA' AS mutation_status, ada.driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter, ce.alteration AS cna_alteration, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM sample_cna_event sce JOIN cna_event ce ON sce.cna_event_id = ce.cna_event_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON sce.sample_id = sp.sample_id AND sce.genetic_profile_id = sp.genetic_profile_id JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sce.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN sample s ON sce.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN patient p ON s.patient_id = p.internal_id JOIN gene g ON ce.entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sce.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sce.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sce.cna_event_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = ce.entrez_gene_id
WHERE sce.sample_id IN (SELECT sample_internal_id FROM sample_ids)
UNION ALL SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol, g.entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, s.internal_id AS sample_internal_id, p.internal_id AS patient_internal_id, gp.stable_id AS genetic_profile_stable_id, 'structural_variant' AS variant_type, 'NA' AS mutation_type, sv.sv_status AS mutation_status, ada.driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter, CAST(NULL AS TINYINT) AS cna_alteration, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM structural_variant sv JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sv.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN sample s ON sv.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN patient p ON s.patient_id = p.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN gene g ON sv.site1_entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON s.internal_id = sp.sample_id AND sp.genetic_profile_id = sv.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sv.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sv.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sv.internal_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = sv.site1_entrez_gene_id
WHERE sv.sample_id IN (SELECT sample_internal_id FROM sample_ids)
UNION ALL SELECT g.hugo_gene_symbol, g.entrez_gene_id, concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', s.stable_id) AS sample_unique_id, s.internal_id AS sample_internal_id, p.internal_id AS patient_internal_id, gp.stable_id AS genetic_profile_stable_id, 'structural_variant' AS variant_type, 'NA' AS mutation_type, sv.sv_status AS mutation_status, ada.driver_filter, ada.driver_tiers_filter, CAST(NULL AS TINYINT) AS cna_alteration, CASE WHEN panel.stable_id IS NOT NULL AND cov.gene_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS off_panel FROM structural_variant sv JOIN genetic_profile gp ON sv.genetic_profile_id = gp.genetic_profile_id JOIN sample s ON sv.sample_id = s.internal_id JOIN patient p ON s.patient_id = p.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON gp.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id JOIN gene g ON sv.site2_entrez_gene_id = g.entrez_gene_id JOIN sample_profile sp ON s.internal_id = sp.sample_id AND sp.genetic_profile_id = sv.genetic_profile_id LEFT JOIN gene_panel panel ON sp.panel_id = panel.internal_id LEFT JOIN alteration_driver_annotation ada ON sv.genetic_profile_id = ada.genetic_profile_id AND sv.sample_id = ada.sample_id AND sv.internal_id = ada.alteration_event_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT gpl.gene_id, gp2.stable_id AS panel_stable_id FROM gene_panel_list gpl JOIN gene_panel gp2 ON gpl.internal_id = gp2.internal_id) cov ON cov.panel_stable_id = panel.stable_id AND cov.gene_id = sv.site2_entrez_gene_id WHERE (sv.site2_entrez_gene_id != sv.site1_entrez_gene_id OR sv.site1_entrez_gene_id IS NULL)
AND sv.sample_id IN (SELECT sample_internal_id FROM sample_ids)
)

WITH sample_ids AS ( SELECT s.internal_id AS sample_internal_id FROM sample s JOIN patient p ON s.patient_id = p.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs ON p.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id WHERE concat(cs.cancer_study_identifier, '_', ${id_stable_id}) IN (#{id}) )
, total_count_by_genes AS ( SELECT ged.hugo_gene_symbol AS hugoGeneSymbol, ged.entrez_gene_id as entrezGeneId, COUNT(DISTINCT ged.${count_id}) as numberOfAlteredCases, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN off_panel = 0 THEN ged.${count_id} END) as numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel FROM ged
1 = 1
AND ged.genetic_profile_stable_id IN (#{id})
GROUP BY ged.entrez_gene_id, ged.hugo_gene_symbol ) SELECT tcg.hugoGeneSymbol AS hugoGeneSymbol, IFNULL(tcg.entrezGeneId, 0) AS entrezGeneId, tcg.numberOfAlteredCases as numberOfAlteredCases, tcg.numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel as numberOfAlteredCasesOnPanel FROM total_count_by_genes tcg
mapper.select:
SELECT genetic_profile.genetic_profile_id as "molecularprofileid", genetic_profile.stable_id as "stableid", genetic_profile.cancer_study_id as "cancerstudyid", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier as "cancerstudyidentifier", genetic_profile.genetic_alteration_type as "molecularalterationtype", genetic_profile.datatype as "datatype", genetic_profile.name as "name", genetic_profile.description as "description", genetic_profile.show_profile_in_analysis_tab as "showprofileinanalysistab", genetic_profile.pivot_threshold as "pivotthreshold", NULLIF(genetic_profile.sort_order, 'N') as "sortorder", NULLIF(genetic_profile.generic_assay_type, 'N') as "genericassaytype", genetic_profile.patient_level as "patientlevel", cancer_study.cancer_study_id as "cancerStudy.cancerstudyid", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier as "cancerstudy.cancerstudyidentifier", cancer_study.type_of_cancer_id as "cancerStudy.typeofcancerid", cancer_study.name as "cancerStudy.name", cancer_study.description as "cancerStudy.description", cancer_study.public as "cancerStudy.publicstudy", cancer_study.pmid as "cancerStudy.pmid", cancer_study.citation as "cancerStudy.citation", cancer_study.`groups` as "cancerStudy.groups", cancer_study.status as "cancerStudy.status", cancer_study.import_date as "cancerStudy.importdate", reference_genome.name as "cancerStudy.referencegenome"
FROM genetic_profile INNER JOIN cancer_study ON genetic_profile.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id INNER JOIN reference_genome ON cancer_study.reference_genome_id = reference_genome.reference_genome_id
